description: Lightweight Vue 3 state management with dependency injection, inspired by Angular services. Replace Vuex/Pinia via class-based services and component-level DI for reactive state sharing.
rules: Use class-based services with dependency injection instead of centralized stores like Pinia/Vuex
All APIs are imported from @kaokei/use-vue-service; @kaokei/di is a required peer dependency but never imported directly
Three scope levels available: component-level (useService/declareProviders), global root (useRootService/declareRootProviders), app-level (useAppService/declareAppProviders)
Mark service classes with @Injectable() decorator to make them injectable via DI container
Retrieve reactive service instances via useService(), useRootService(), or useAppService() composables
Use declareProviders() in component setup to bind services to component scope — service lifecycle matches the component's
For Nuxt projects, use @kaokei/nuxt-use-vue-service module for auto-imports instead of manual imports
